name: Open Source Collaborator
content: Arnold ships clean, well-documented projects and responds quickly to feedback. His handwriting recognition and IoT repos show real engineering depth.

name: Project Mentor
content: Strong fundamentals in Java and Python. Built end-to-end systems — from MySQL backends to ML pipelines — with clear READMEs and reproducible setup.

name: Peer Reviewer
content: Reliable teammate on group assignments. Delivers working code on time and explains technical decisions clearly.
